# Rabbia Ashraf - Full Context

## Professional Profile
Rabbia Ashraf is a Clinical Child Psychologist, Researcher, Behavior Therapist, ASD & ADHD Intervention Specialist based in Lahore, Pakistan.
Experience includes pediatric hospitals, parent training, ABA-informed intervention, psychological assessment, and play therapy.

## Main Services
1. Online Parent Consultation: For international families seeking behavioral and developmental guidance.
2. Autism Support: Neurodiversity-affirming strategies, communication support, sensory profile understanding.
3. ADHD Executive Function Coaching: Support for working memory, task initiation, and emotional regulation.
4. School/IEP Consultation: Collaborating with educators.
5. Local Assessments (Lahore only): Comprehensive psychological and developmental assessments.

## Pricing Summary (subject to change)
- Initial Parent Consultation: PKR 7,000 / USD 35 / AUD 55
- Follow-up Parent Session: PKR 7,000 / USD 35 / AUD 55
- ADHD/ASD specialized sessions: USD 45 / AUD 70
- 4-Session Parent Training Package: USD 160 / AUD 245
- Local Psychological Assessment: PKR 25,000+

## Legal & Ethical Disclaimer
Clinical therapy, diagnosis, and regulated psychological services are provided only where legally and ethically permitted. International consultations are educational, parent-guidance, and support-planning services unless otherwise allowed by local regulations.
